description: A vibrant post-impressionist oil painting depicting a coastal scene at St. Malo, France. The foreground shows a sandy beach crowded with colorful bathing huts or cabanas in red, white, blue, and yellow, with small figures of beachgoers scattered among them. Beyond the beach stretches a blue-green harbor with several white sailboats and a dark steamship. A large rust-and-green colored headland or island rises in the middle distance. Above, a dramatic sky fills the upper third with thick impasto clouds in white, yellow, and pale blue against patches of green and blue sky.
